news.summary: Encouraging preliminary findings from a Phase 2a trial studying GRI-0621 for Idiopathic Pulmonary Fibrosis (IPF) have been reported. After two weeks, the safety data and biomarker results are promising. The ongoing study aims to assess the efficacy of GRI-0621 in treating IPF. These interim results suggest potential benefits in addressing this condition.
news.headline: GRI Bio reports Q1 2025 financials, confirms Phase 2a IPF trial on track. Positive interim results show promising safety & biomarkers. Topline data expected Q3 2025.

news.summary: President Trump mentioned that New Delhi is prepared to impose zero tariffs on the United States. However, India's foreign minister noted that discussions between the two nations are still ongoing.
news.headline: Trump suggests India may charge US "no tariff." India's FM reveals ongoing negotiations between the two countries.

news.summary: The 2021 Naravane Cabernet by Rasa Vineyards is a tribute to the strength and sophistication of Eastern Washington wine, influenced by the influential Naravane family matriarchs. This ultra-premium offering showcases the essence of the region. Based in Walla Walla, Rasa Vineyards is known for producing top-quality wines that highlight the unique terroir of the area. Released on May 15, 2025, this exceptional wine embodies the legacy and expertise of the Naravane family in the wine industry.
news.headline: Rasa Vineyards' 2021 Naravane Cabernet achieves perfect rating. Limited-edition release celebrates power and elegance.

news.summary: On May 15, 2025, in Orlando, Florida, a company named Delay Defense introduced the first indemnified travel membership program amidst ongoing travel disruptions. These disruptions include air traffic control failures, in-flight emergencies, and flight diversions. The program aims to provide immediate assistance to travelers facing such challenges.
news.headline: Delay Defense introduces first-of-its-kind indemnified travel membership to aid travelers during flight chaos. (x) disruptions tackled.

news.summary: In May 2025, My Home Group (MHG), a prominent real estate firm in Arizona, is commemorating its 20th year in operation. Established in 2005, MHG has become a leading and rapidly expanding brokerage in the state. The company has been instrumental in assisting hundreds of thousands of clients in the real estate market over the past two decades.
news.headline: My Home Group (MHG) celebrates 20 years in Arizona real estate, founded in 2005, aiding thousands. #25Years #RealEstate

news.summary: Zenkyu Matcha, a wellness brand based in Tokyo, known for its connection to Zen philosophy and the Japanese tea ceremony, has launched globally. The company is offering free worldwide shipping from Japan to subscribers. This initiative was announced on May 15, 2025. Zenkyu Matcha aims to promote health and mindfulness through its products and rituals.
news.headline: Tokyo-based Zenkyu Matcha launches globally, offering ceremonial matcha; free worldwide shipping for subscribers.

news.summary: On May 15, 2025, The Gabelli Multimedia Trust Inc. (NYSE: GGT) issued a correction regarding the September Payable Date. In the original release on May 14, 2025, the payable date was mistakenly stated as September 16, 2025. The accurate payable date for September is September 23, 2025. Investors should take note of this correction to ensure accurate information is recorded.
news.headline: Gabelli Multimedia Trust maintains $0.88 per share annual distribution, continues monthly payouts. Sept. payable date: Sept. 23, 2025.

news.summary: CanAsia Energy Corp. reported its first quarter financial results for 2025, with a net loss of $0.7 million compared to $0.6 million in the same period in 2024. The company had working capital of $2.3 million and shareholders' equity of $7.2 million as of March 31, 2025. There were 112.8 million common shares outstanding in May 2025. Cash flow used in operations was $1.2 million in the first quarter of 2025, mainly due to general and administrative expenses and operating expenses to maintain the shut-in facility of Andora Energy Corporation. General and administrative expenses were $0.5 million, with personnel and premises costs at $0.2 million and external service costs at $0.2 million. Operating expenses were $0.2 million in the first quarter of 2025. CanAsia is focused on evaluating a potential bid in the upcoming onshore Thailand 25th Licensing Round, with bids due by July 16, 2025. More details can be found on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: CanAsia Energy Corp. reports $2.3M working capital, $7.2M equity, $0.7M net loss in 2025 Q1, bid focus for Thailand licensing round.

news.summary: NetEase, Inc. (NASDAQ: NTES) released its first-quarter fiscal results, showing a 7.4% year-on-year increase in quarterly revenue to $3.97 billion (28.8 billion Chinese yuan), surpassing the analyst consensus of $3.87 billion. The adjusted earnings per diluted share came in at $2.41, higher than the analyst estimate of $2.01. In terms of business segments, Games and related value-added services revenues saw a 12.1% growth to $3.3 billion with a gross margin decrease of 62 basis points to 68.8%. This drop was primarily due to increased revenue from licensed games that have lower gross profit margins. For a detailed insight, visit Benzinga.com.
news.headline: NetEase's Q1 revenue reaches $3.97B, gaming segment up 12.1%, adjusted EPADS beats estimate at $2.41.

news.summary: In Kfar Saba, Israel, on May 15, 2025, ParaZero Technologies Ltd. (Nasdaq: PRZO), a company specializing in safety systems for commercial drones and defense Counter UAS systems, will present its latest innovations at XPONENTIAL 2025. This leading international exhibition for unmanned systems and robotics is scheduled for May 19-22, 2025, at the George R. Brown Convention Center in Houston.
news.headline: ParaZero will showcase next-gen drone safety tech & CUAS Net Launcher at XPONENTIAL 2025 in Houston from May 19-22.

news.summary: A license obtained from the KPKT has authorized Credilab to offer AI-driven microloans and financing for small and medium enterprises (SMEs) across the country. The services provided will be paperless, instant, and without the need for physical branches. This license enables Credilab to extend financial assistance widely, leveraging advanced technology.
news.headline: VCI Global's fintech arm Credilab gets regulatory approval for digital lending, aiming two-minute loan disbursements.
eToro CEO Yoni Assia says they started buying for their treasury at $5 and made $50 million

news.summary: In Jacksonville, Florida, on May 15, 2025, Advanced Business Computers of America (ABCoA) announced their status as the top operating system for the non-prime finance sector. Established in 1983, ABCoA remains at the forefront of AI-automation and vertical A.I. agents. The company offers a comprehensive range of loan solutions and has proved to be a pioneering force in the industry.
news.headline: AI agent by ABCoA in Jacksonville is transforming payments and collections industry with cutting-edge technology since 1983.

news.summary: A growing number of homeowners are opting for A.I. Certified Agents trained at the Krem Institute of Artificial Intelligence in Cleveland, Ohio over traditional agents. Over 60% of homeowners have identified their house as their most valuable asset. The trend is on the rise as more individuals are recognizing the benefits of utilizing artificial intelligence in real estate transactions.
news.headline: Homeowners choosing A.I. certified agents with Krem Institute training over traditional agents. Over 60% value their houses as most valuable asset.

news.summary: In an article by USA Today titled "Trust Is Earned – 20 Years in the Wild West of Timeshare Exit," Gordon Newton, President of Newton Group and a prominent figure in timeshare exit, was showcased. This feature highlights Newton's expertise in the field after two decades, establishing him as the top authority in the nation. The article sheds light on the challenges and successes he has encountered in navigating the timeshare industry. Newton's profile underscores his significant impact and experience in the sector.
news.headline: Leading timeshare expert Gordon Newton featured in USA Today for 20 years in industry.

news.summary: In May 15, 2025, a heartwarming success story emerged from Santa Ynez, California, where the Faith of a Child Foundation initiated support for Sonrise Ministries back in 2018. The Foundation provided financial assistance for infant formula and diapers to aid abandoned babies. The initial development efforts were straightforward and essential, with the US organization investing in crucial resources for the cause.
news.headline: Christian orphanage in Africa supported by Faith of a Child Foundation has transformed rural community with infant formula and diapers funding since 2018.

news.summary: In London on May 15, 2025, YSMART, a successful group in the everyday carry (EDC) market known for their triumphs on Kickstarter, has introduced their latest product, BITZ. This micro-knife features a tungsten blade, magnetic quick-release mechanism, and a high-grade titanium construction.
news.headline: YSMART launched BITZ, world's smallest knife, with tungsten blade and magnetic quick-release system.

news.summary: In a recent announcement on May 15, 2025, RockDove Solutions, the creator of the In Case of Crisis platform, revealed a new collaboration with the Institute for Crisis Management (ICM). The partnership aims to combine RockDove's expertise in threat and crisis management with ICM's specialization in crisis planning, training, and consulting services. This strategic alliance is poised to significantly enhance capabilities in addressing crises effectively. The precise terms of the partnership and the potential impact on clients have not been disclosed publicly.
news.headline: RockDove Solutions partners with Institute for Crisis Management to provide crisis preparedness platform.

news.summary: InterContinental Hotels has demonstrated an increase in price performance, resulting in an upgrade of its IBD Relative Strength Rating from 78 to 81. The stock of InterContinental is rapidly approaching a new buy point, indicating positive momentum in its financial growth.
news.headline: InterContinental Hotels stock rising towards buy point with 3-point increase in Relative Strength Rating.

news.summary: Following impressive earnings and positive sales forecasts, Birkenstock experienced a surge in its stock performance, mirroring On Holding's success. Both shoemakers witnessed a significant increase in their shares, edging closer to buy points. This development highlights the market's positive response to Birkenstock and On Holding, indicating promising growth potential for both companies.
news.headline: Birkenstock shares rise after strong earnings and positive sales forecasts, following On Holding's lead.

news.summary: Following a strong performance in fiscal Q3, Cisco's stock saw an increase as the company exceeded Wall Street estimates in both earnings and revenue. The tech giant reported a significant rebound in new product orders, particularly in the growing sector of artificial intelligence. Additionally, Cisco announced the appointment of a new Chief Financial Officer. The positive results and strategic changes have generated optimism among investors, leading to a rise in the company's stock.
news.headline: Cisco reported fiscal Q3 earnings and revenue exceeding estimates, with stock climbing. New CFO appointed.

news.summary: Deere reported earnings in line with estimates but slightly decreased its full-year outlook. DE stock experienced a slight increase near a potential buy point. This development comes after the ag giant met earnings expectations, signaling optimism for investors.
news.headline: Deere's earnings meet estimates, stock rises near buy point despite lowered outlook for the year.

news.summary: On May 15, 2025, Data Storage Corporation (Nasdaq: DTST), a prominent company offering multi-cloud hosting, managed cloud services, disaster recovery, cybersecurity, and IT automation with links to AWS, Microsoft Azure, and Google Cloud, disclosed its recent performance and financial outcomes for the quarter finishing on March 31, 2025.
news.headline: DTST reports Q1 2025 financial results, offering cloud hosting & cybersecurity services.

news.summary: In Downey, California, on May 15, 2025, Blum Holdings, Inc. (OTCQB: BLMH) divulged the signing of an Amended and Restated Binding Letter of Intent (A&R LOI) to purchase 100% of the common stock from a licensed retail cannabis operator in Northern California. This update follows prior announcements made on January 21, 2025, and February 4, 2025. Blum Holdings is a publicly traded holding company and cannabis operator headquartered in California.
news.headline: Blum Holdings, Inc. doubled revenue potential by acquiring 100% of common stock of a Northern California dispensary.

news.summary: Autonomix has recently obtained a new patent that bolsters their intellectual property standing in the field of nerve-mapping and denervation. This patent enhances their position in advancing minimally invasive therapies that are focused on nerves. This development is crucial for Autonomix as they continue to expand their innovative approach in the medical industry.
news.headline: Autonomix Medical, Inc. receives a key U.S. patent for catheter-based technology, bolstering their IP in nerve therapy.

news.summary: In Kennewick, Washington, on May 15, 2025, Vivos Inc. revealed that the University of Florida Veterinary Hospital has obtained certification to provide IsoPet® Precision Radionuclide Therapy™, an innovative cancer treatment for animals. Vivos Inc. (OTCQB: RDGL) made the announcement, highlighting the significant progress in pet cancer treatments.
news.headline: Vivos Inc certifies University of Florida Veterinary Hospital for IsoPet® Precision Radionuclide Therapy™, a cancer treatment for animals. OTG: RDGL.

news.summary: Sienna Senior Living Inc., based in Markham, Ontario, declared a dividend of $0.078 per common share (TSX: SIA) for May 2025. This equates to $0.936 per common share annually.
news.headline: Sienna Senior Living Inc. announces May dividend of $0.078 per share, $0.936 annually.

news.summary: HeartCore Enterprises, Inc., a prominent enterprise software and consulting services company headquartered in Tokyo, disclosed its financial performance for the first quarter concluding on March 31, 2025. The company, listed as HTCR on Nasdaq, shared these results from New York and Tokyo on May 15, 2025.
news.headline: HeartCore Enterprises reported Q1 2025 financial results, being a leading software company with HQ in Tokyo.

news.summary: Ascot Resources Ltd. in Vancouver, British Columbia, announced amendments regarding their upcoming annual general meeting of shareholders to be held on June 18, 2025. This follows director resignations, prompting the filing of an amended notice of meeting, form of proxy, and management information circular. The amended materials replace the prior versions and shareholders are urged to review the updated circular, which supersedes the previous version dated May 1, 2025, and to fill out the new proxy. The company's ticker symbols are TSX: AOT and OTCQX: AOTVF.
news.headline: Ascot Resources Ltd. amends meeting materials after director resignations, with new notice, proxy, and circular for June 18, 2025 meeting.

news.summary: Apple iSports Group, Inc., a California-based company trading on OTC-QB under the symbol AAPI, has recently entered into a non-binding Letter of Intent with AmeriCrew Inc., which is a technology infrastructure and managed services company based in Delaware. This announcement was made on May 15, 2025. Apple iSports is known for its expertise in entertainment, media, iGaming, and technology services. This new partnership signifies a significant step for both companies as they explore potential collaborations in the industry.
news.headline: Apple iSports Group signs letter of intent to acquire AmeriCrew Inc, a technology company.

news.summary: A biopharmaceutical company called CorMedix Inc. (Nasdaq: CRMD) based in Berkeley Heights, N.J., is dedicated to developing and marketing therapeutic products for serious diseases. The company is set to take part in the RBC Capital Markets Global Healthcare Conference scheduled in New York on May 20-21, 2025. This event will be a platform for CorMedix Inc. to showcase its advancements.
news.headline: CorMedix Inc. (Nasdaq: CRMD) will attend RBC Global Healthcare Conference in New York on May 20-21, 2025.

news.summary: A recent key appointment has been made in the company, with an individual bringing significant experience in capital markets and a proven track record of expanding early-stage businesses. This strategic hire is expected to bolster the company's operations and growth as they leverage their expertise. The new member's background includes expertise in handling significant capital and a successful history of growing companies from their initial stages. This move is anticipated to have a positive impact on the company's trajectory, providing valuable insight and guidance.
news.headline: Beeline appoints Frank Knuettel II to Board of Directors for capital markets expertise and company scaling.

news.summary: On May 15, 2025, Brag House Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: TBH) revealed that its CEO and Co-Founder Lavell Juan Malloy II was featured in Authority Magazine's Startup Revolution series. This prominent Gen Z engagement platform, situated at the convergence of gaming, college sports, and social interaction, is making waves in the industry. The profile showcases Malloy's leadership in steering the company towards success, gaining recognition for his innovative approach. This news underscores Brag House's position as a trailblazer in the field, capturing the attention of a broad audience.
news.headline: Brag House CEO Lavell Juan Malloy II featured in Authority Magazine's Startup Revolution Series.

news.summary: Hallador Energy Company (Nasdaq: HNRG) from Terre Haute, Indiana, revealed its plans to partake in three investor conferences set for May and June 2025. This move signifies the Company's proactive engagement with investors, aiming to enhance its presence and potentially attract new investor interest.
news.headline: Hallador Energy (Nasdaq: HNRG) to participate in 3 investor conferences in May and June 2025.
